title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.656 - Waiver or exception request of administrative rule or standard, procedure
text:
630.656.  Waiver or exception request of administrative rule or standard, procedure. — Notwithstanding any rule to the contrary, any request for a waiver or exception of administrative rule or standard shall be approved by an exceptions committee created by the filing agency and such committee shall be considered a public governmental body operating under chapter 610.
(L. 1995 S.B. 374 § 630.655)
